name: _Diag_SendFunctional
title: _Diag_SendFunctional
description: With this CAPL callback function CANoe triggers the CAPL program to send a functional diagnostic request.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The data of the diagnostic primitive (request) that should be transmitted on the bus.

availability: Real bus mode Online mode ECU tester
